markdown.markdown:
Stáhnout data v XLSX

```{r} library(sf) library(leaflet) library(dplyr) # Obecné nastavení pro všechny mapy # ---------------------------- legend_levels <- c("0-1 bod", "2-7 bodů", "8-11 bodů", "12-30 bodů") legend_colors <- c("#E1E1E1", "#DDE352", "#FA944A", "#C8413C") legend_title <- "Kategorie" fill_opacity <- 0.8 border_color <- "#666666" border_weight <- 0.2 make_kategorie <- function(x) { case_when( x >= 0 & x <= 1 ~ "0-1 bod", x >= 2 & x <= 7 ~ "2-7 bodů", x >= 8 & x <= 11 ~ "8-11 bodů", x >= 12 & x <= 30 ~ "12-30 bodů", TRUE ~ NA_character_ ) } make_popup <- function(obec, hodnota, kategorie, label_hodnoty) { paste0( "", obec, "
", label_hodnoty, ": ", hodnota, "
" ) } pal <- colorFactor( palette = legend_colors, domain = legend_levels, ordered = TRUE, na.color = "#ffffff" ) add_isv_layer <- function(map_obj, data, kat_col, popup_col, group_name) { map_obj |> addPolygons( data = data, fillColor = pal(data[[kat_col]]), fillOpacity = fill_opacity, color = border_color, weight = border_weight, popup = data[[popup_col]], group = group_name ) } # ---------------------------- # Data # ---------------------------- isv_map <- readRDS("data-processed/isv-map.rds") |> mutate( kat18 = factor(make_kategorie(`18_isv`), levels = legend_levels), kat24 = factor(make_kategorie(`24_isv`), levels = legend_levels), popup18 = make_popup(NAZ_OBEC, `18_isv`, kat18, "18_isv"), popup24 = make_popup(NAZ_OBEC, `24_isv`, kat24, "24_isv") ) # ---------------------------- # Mapa # ---------------------------- leaflet() |> add_isv_layer(isv_map, "kat18", "popup18", "18 orig") |> add_isv_layer(isv_map, "kat24", "popup24", "24 orig") |> hideGroup("24 orig") |> addLayersControl( baseGroups = c("18 orig", "24 orig"), options = layersControlOptions(collapsed = FALSE) ) |> addLegend( position = "bottomright", colors = legend_colors, labels = legend_levels, title = legend_title, opacity = fill_opacity ) ```
markdown.srcMarkdownNoYaml:
Stáhnout data v XLSX

```{r} library(sf) library(leaflet) library(dplyr) # ---------------------------- # Obecné nastavení pro všechny mapy # ---------------------------- legend_levels <- c("0-1 bod", "2-7 bodů", "8-11 bodů", "12-30 bodů") legend_colors <- c("#E1E1E1", "#DDE352", "#FA944A", "#C8413C") legend_title <- "Kategorie" fill_opacity <- 0.8 border_color <- "#666666" border_weight <- 0.2 make_kategorie <- function(x) { case_when( x >= 0 & x <= 1 ~ "0-1 bod", x >= 2 & x <= 7 ~ "2-7 bodů", x >= 8 & x <= 11 ~ "8-11 bodů", x >= 12 & x <= 30 ~ "12-30 bodů", TRUE ~ NA_character_ ) } make_popup <- function(obec, hodnota, kategorie, label_hodnoty) { paste0( "", obec, "
", label_hodnoty, ": ", hodnota, "
" ) } pal <- colorFactor( palette = legend_colors, domain = legend_levels, ordered = TRUE, na.color = "#ffffff" ) add_isv_layer <- function(map_obj, data, kat_col, popup_col, group_name) { map_obj |> addPolygons( data = data, fillColor = pal(data[[kat_col]]), fillOpacity = fill_opacity, color = border_color, weight = border_weight, popup = data[[popup_col]], group = group_name ) } # ---------------------------- # Data # ---------------------------- isv_map <- readRDS("data-processed/isv-map.rds") |> mutate( kat18 = factor(make_kategorie(`18_isv`), levels = legend_levels), kat24 = factor(make_kategorie(`24_isv`), levels = legend_levels), popup18 = make_popup(NAZ_OBEC, `18_isv`, kat18, "18_isv"), popup24 = make_popup(NAZ_OBEC, `24_isv`, kat24, "24_isv") ) # ---------------------------- # Mapa # ---------------------------- leaflet() |> add_isv_layer(isv_map, "kat18", "popup18", "18 orig") |> add_isv_layer(isv_map, "kat24", "popup24", "24 orig") |> hideGroup("24 orig") |> addLayersControl( baseGroups = c("18 orig", "24 orig"), options = layersControlOptions(collapsed = FALSE) ) |> addLegend( position = "bottomright", colors = legend_colors, labels = legend_levels, title = legend_title, opacity = fill_opacity ) ```
